name: Example script / 剧本示例
description: Each segment has a high_level_prompt. The LLM expands it into the detailed second-by-second format.

segments.high_level_prompt: Woman standing in a park, calm morning, gentle breeze in her hair
She starts walking slowly toward the path
She pauses to look at flowers by the path
She continues walking, skirt swaying slightly
She turns her head to look at something off-camera
She smiles and walks out of frame slowly
